name: XGBoost Regressor
description: XGBoost Regressor is a high-performance gradient boosting algorithm designed for predicting continuous numeric values with strong accuracy and scalability.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and performs XGBoost Regression
output: The XGBoost Model generated is passed along to the next nodes. The input DataFrame is also passed along to the next nodes

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column containing all input features used to train the regression model.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: Target column containing the continuous numeric value the model is trained to predict.

fields.name: predictionCol
fields.title: Prediction Column
fields.description: Output column where predicted numeric values are written after model scoring.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Controls the proportion of data used for training versus validation.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Maximum depth of each decision tree, controlling model complexity and overfitting.

fields.name: maxBins
fields.title: Max Bins
fields.description: Maximum number of bins used for discretizing feature values during split evaluation.

fields.name: maxLeaves
fields.title: Max Leaves
fields.description: Maximum number of leaf nodes allowed per tree, limiting tree growth.

fields.name: numRound
fields.title: Num Round
fields.description: Number of boosting iterations used to sequentially build trees.

fields.name: numWorkers
fields.title: Num Workers
fields.description: Number of parallel worker threads used during model training.

fields.name: objective
fields.title: Objective
fields.description: Defines the regression objective function optimized during training.

fields.name: eta
fields.title: Eta
fields.description: Learning rate that controls how much each tree contributes to the final prediction.

fields.name: regLambda
fields.title: Reg Lambda
fields.description: L2 regularization term that helps prevent overfitting.

fields.name: regAlpha
fields.title: Reg Alpha
fields.description: L1 regularization term that promotes sparsity in the model.

fields.name: subsample
fields.title: Sub Sample
fields.description: Fraction of training data sampled for each boosting round.

fields.name: sampleType
fields.title: Sample Type
fields.description: Controls how training samples are selected during boosting.

fields.name: treeMethod
fields.title: Tree Method
fields.description: Algorithm used to construct decision trees efficiently.

fields.name: useExternalMemory
fields.title: Use External Memory
fields.description: Enables out-of-core computation for very large datasets.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed value used to ensure reproducible model training.

fields.name: baseScore
fields.title: Base Score
fields.description: Initial prediction score before any boosting iterations.

fields.name: minChildWeight
fields.title: Min Child Weight
fields.description: Minimum sum of instance weights needed in a child node to allow further splits.

fields.name: colsampleBylevel
fields.title: Col Sample By Level
fields.description: Fraction of features sampled at each tree level.

fields.name: colsampleBytree
fields.title: Col Sample By Tree
fields.description: Fraction of features sampled for each tree.

fields.name: minSplitLoss
fields.title: Min Split Loss
fields.description: Minimum loss reduction required to make a further partition.

fields.name: maxDeltaStep
fields.title: Max Delta Step
fields.description: Maximum step size allowed for weight updates.

fields.name: sketchEps
fields.title: Sketch Eps
fields.description: Precision parameter for approximate histogram construction.

fields.name: scalePosWeight
fields.title: Scale Pos Weight
fields.description: Scales gradients for imbalanced regression problems.

fields.name: growPlicy
fields.title: Grow Policy
fields.description: Defines how trees grow, either level-by-level or guided by loss reduction.

fields.name: normalizeType
fields.title: Normalize Type
fields.description: Controls how normalization is applied during boosting.

fields.name: skipDrop
fields.title: Skip Drop
fields.description: Probability of skipping trees during DART boosting.

fields.name: rateDrop
fields.title: Rate Drop
fields.description: Dropout rate for trees during boosting.
